chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, MIRPURKHAS C.P. No.S-232 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For order on office objection. For order on MA No.4164/2025. For hearing of main case. 24.12.2025 Mr. Abdul Razzak Dasti advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Sharif Solangi, Assistant A.G. Sindh along with SIP Patomal PS Nagarparkar. Mr. Muzaffar Ali Laghari advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondents No.6&7, taken on record. Comments filed on behalf of respondent No.2 are taken on record. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that official respondents in league with the private respondents are creating harassment and hurdles in the smooth running of “Foundation Assisted Secondary Public School, Veer” (SEF) under the supervision of Secretary Education & Literacy Department, Government of Sindh. Learned counsel for private respondents submits that neither they harassed the petitioner nor intend to harass in future. Learned A.A.G. Sindh submits that the police officials are duty bound to provide protection to the petitioner in accordance with law. In view of above, instant petition stands disposed of with the direction to the official respondents (police) to act strictly in accordance with law and provide protection to the petitioner’s School in its smooth running and not indulge themselves in the dispute between private parties, if any. While, the private respondents have any grievance, if any, with regard to the act of administration of School, the aggrieved party is at liberty to approach proper forum but no any harassment shall be made in future. Senior Superintendent of Police, Tharparkar @ Mithi is directed to maintain law and order situation with regard to the affairs of said school.

While, the private respondents have any grievance, if any, with regard to the act of administration of School, the aggrieved party is at liberty to approach proper forum but no any harassment shall be made in future. Senior Superintendent of Police, Tharparkar @ Mithi is directed to maintain law and order situation with regard to the affairs of said school. Let copy of this order be communicated to SSP Tharparkar @ Mithi for compliance. JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
